doc_content.summary: Improves stark-skills prompts based on a Prompt Improvement Assessment from a completed /stark-review run. It parses the assessment, classifies required actions into prompt edits, orchestrator fixes, or config updates, and applies surgical, backward-compatible changes. Finally, it validates the changes, logs the learning into a changelog, and creates a local git commit.
key_features: Extracts prompt assessment matrices from conversational context or history logs.
Performs minimal, targeted surgical modifications to Markdown prompts, Python orchestrators, and JSON configuration files.
Runs built-in validation (markdown parsing, python compilation checking, json validation) and requests user diff review.
Automatically tracks learnings in `docs/prompt-changelog.md` and generates structured local commits.

alt_text: A visualization diagram and architectural breakdown for the stark-review-improvement skill, showing a 5-phase execution flow from extracting assessments to parsing actions, applying minimal edits to prompts/scripts/config, validating syntax, logging to a changelog, and generating a local commit.
